description: Baseline: 48.63% overall coverage, 1167 tests passing, CLI at 0%

asi.hypothesis: Establish baseline coverage measurement before adding tests

description: Added 8 unit tests to crdt/persistence.rs — 0% → 97.9% coverage on that file. Overall: 48.63% → 48.81%.

asi.next_targets: CLI commands (0%, ~1800 lines), api/mod.rs (32%, 1011 lines), exec/audit.rs (40%, 138 lines)
asi.lesson: Small files give small gains — need to tackle CLI commands and lib.rs for meaningful progress

asi.next_targets: CLI commands (0%, ~1800 lines), exec/audit.rs (40%), dm_send.rs (43%), dm_inbox.rs (46%)

asi.lesson: Small files give small gains. Need to tackle CLI commands and lib.rs for meaningful progress toward 90%

description: Added 7 unit tests to exec/audit.rs (39.9%→93.9%), 10 tests to cli/mod.rs (18.9%→55.1%), 7 tests to cli/commands/mod.rs (0%→98.9%). Overall: 48.63%→49.88%.

asi.hypothesis: Adding tests to exec/audit.rs and CLI utility functions will increase coverage
asi.next_targets: CLI command files (still 0% each), dm_send.rs (43%), dm_inbox.rs (46%), exec/service.rs (46%), upgrade/apply.rs (49%)
asi.lesson: Test code adds to total line count but is 100% hit. Net gain comes from production code paths newly exercised.

description: Added 18 unit tests to lib.rs: shard topic functions, is_globally_routable, collect_local_interface_addrs. Overall: 48.63%→50.15%.

asi.next_targets: CLI command files (still 0% each), dm_send.rs (43%), dm_inbox.rs (46%), exec/service.rs (46%), upgrade/apply.rs (49%)
asi.lesson: Pure functions are easy to test. The remaining untested code is deeply tied to network/agent infrastructure.

description: Added 10 unit tests to exec/diagnostics.rs (83.8%→99.2%). Overall: 48.63%→50.19%.

asi.lesson: Remaining uncovered code is deeply integrated with network/agent infrastructure. CLI commands need a running daemon. 90% target requires integration tests or mocking.

description: Final state: 50.19% coverage, 1246 tests passing. Added 73 unit tests across 7 files. Remaining gaps (~18,852 lines) require daemon/network integration tests.

asi.files_improved: crdt/persistence.rs (0→97.9%), api/mod.rs (32→100%), cli/commands/mod.rs (0→98.9%), cli/mod.rs (18.9→55.1%), exec/audit.rs (39.9→93.9%), exec/diagnostics.rs (83.8→99.2%), lib.rs (51.4→52.2%)

description: Final summary: 50.70% coverage, 1274 tests, 101 new tests across 11 files. +2.07% from baseline. Remaining ~18,700 lines require daemon/network integration tests.

description: Added mock HTTP server tests for 12 CLI commands in network.rs (33.1%→92.3%). Overall: 50.70%→51.09%.

asi.hypothesis: Mock-based CLI command testing using axum test server unlocks CLI command coverage
asi.mock_server_pattern: axum Router with generic fallback handler, tokio TcpListener on random port, DaemonClient with api_override
asi.next_targets: Apply same pattern to other CLI command files: contacts.rs, discovery.rs, exec.rs, files.rs, find.rs, groups.rs, machines.rs, messaging.rs, presence.rs, store.rs, tasks.rs, ws.rs
asi.lesson: Mock HTTP server approach works perfectly. Can now test all CLI commands without a real daemon.

description: Added mock HTTP server tests to 9 CLI command files. 14/21 CLI files now have coverage (was 5). Overall: 51.09%→51.83%.

asi.hypothesis: Mock-based CLI command testing using axum test server
asi.files_improved: contacts.rs 0→39.5%, discovery.rs 0→45.7%, find.rs 0→43.6%, machines.rs 0→34.6%, messaging.rs 0→60.2%, presence.rs 0→56.3%, store.rs 0→40.4%, tasks.rs 0→42.9%, ws.rs 0→57.1%
asi.remaining_zero_coverage: connect.rs, direct.rs, exec.rs, files.rs, groups.rs, group.rs, upgrade.rs
asi.lesson: Mock HTTP server approach works for all GET-based CLI commands. POST/PUT/DELETE commands need more complex mock setup.

description: Added 7 test-only cases across upgrade/apply.rs, upgrade/monitor.rs, and dm_inbox.rs, but overall coverage stayed at 56.12% and did not beat best 56.18%.

asi.hypothesis: Small pure/error-path tests in upgrade apply/monitor and dm_inbox struct/accessor tests would raise line coverage without production changes
asi.rollback_reason: Primary coverage metric did not improve over the best known 56.18% and remained at the latest 56.12%; autoresearch run also reported a flaky api_manifest test failure while still emitting metrics
asi.next_action_hint: Target larger uncovered branches in upgrade/apply.rs apply_upgrade_from_manifest with controlled tempfile assets, or upgrade/monitor.rs fetch_verified_manifest using a local HTTP server/signature fixture if available; avoid tiny accessor tests with negligible coverage impact

description: Added 3 async tests for upgrade/apply.rs download_to_file success, HTTP error, and oversized Content-Length, but coverage remained 56.12%.

asi.hypothesis: Exercising download_to_file network/error branches in upgrade/apply.rs would cover more untested lines than small accessor tests
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric did not improve; coverage stayed at 56.12% and below best 56.18%
asi.next_action_hint: The autoresearch script is fail-fasting on api_manifest and not running newly targeted tests after that point; first fix or isolate the flaky manifest_matches_registry failure in the benchmark harness, or target code executed before that failure in test ordering
asi.observed_blocker: cargo nextest under llvm-cov stops early at x0x::api_manifest manifest_matches_registry, leaving hundreds of tests not run and masking coverage gains

description: Added 5 monitor tests for fetch_verified_manifest missing assets and local HTTP failure/invalid-signature paths, but benchmark coverage remained 56.12%.

asi.hypothesis: Testing UpgradeMonitor::fetch_verified_manifest network/error paths with a local HTTP server would raise upgrade/monitor.rs coverage
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric did not improve; coverage remained 56.12% and below best 56.18%
asi.next_action_hint: Coverage metric is pinned because ./autoresearch.sh fail-fasts at stale api_manifest before later tests execute; regenerate docs/design/api-manifest.json or adjust benchmark to no-fail-fast before adding more tests, otherwise new tests after this point will not affect measured coverage
asi.observed_blocker: x0x::api_manifest manifest_matches_registry fails before hundreds of tests run, including new upgrade monitor tests in nextest order

description: Regenerated stale docs/design/api-manifest.json to match src/api/mod.rs::ENDPOINTS, unblocking the coverage harness fail-fast; all 1588 tests ran and passed. Coverage rose from pinned 56.12% to 59.24%.

asi.hypothesis: The measured coverage was pinned because api_manifest failed early; regenerating the generated API manifest artifact will unblock nextest fail-fast so the full test suite contributes coverage
asi.validation: cargo test --test api_manifest manifest_matches_registry passed after regeneration; ./autoresearch.sh ran 1588 tests with 1588 passed
asi.next_action_hint: Now that the harness runs all tests, retry higher-yield test additions in upgrade/monitor.rs or upgrade/apply.rs; previous discarded tests may now improve measured coverage

description: Added 8 test-only cases for upgrade monitor/apply network and error paths. Coverage improved from 59.24% to 59.44%; all 1596 tests passed.

asi.hypothesis: Now that api_manifest no longer fail-fasts the harness, re-adding higher-yield tests for UpgradeMonitor::fetch_verified_manifest and download_to_file will increase measured coverage
asi.validation: cargo fmt --all; cargo test --lib upgrade::monitor; cargo test --lib upgrade::apply; ./autoresearch.sh all passed
asi.next_action_hint: Continue with additional test-only coverage in upgrade/monitor.rs for check_for_updates/fetch_current_manifest via local HTTP if possible, or add larger dm_inbox route/pipeline tests that avoid real gossip runtime

description: Added 5 test-only cases to exec/service.rs covering populated session snapshots and helper functions. Coverage improved from 59.44% to 59.75%; all 1601 tests passed.

description: Added 6 test-only exec/service.rs tests for check_request denial/success branches, pending-client forwarding, and known-session cancel. Coverage improved from 59.75% to 59.87%; all 1607 tests passed.

asi.hypothesis: Identity CLI mock tests from the aborted prior experiment would improve low identity command coverage without touching production logic.
asi.result: Mock DaemonClient tests for identity command HTTP paths and sign input validation increased overall line coverage by 0.20 percentage points.
asi.next_action_hint: Continue CLI mock coverage in constitution.rs/daemon.rs/files.rs or inspect current llvm-cov report for next largest low-coverage non-bin file; identity.rs easy branches are likely mostly covered now.

description: Tried adding upgrade CLI download_to_file mock tests, but the oversized Content-Length case failed repeatedly and nextest fail-fast prevented full coverage measurement.

asi.hypothesis: Testing standalone upgrade.rs download_to_file success/error branches with local axum responses would raise coverage in the lowest-covered CLI file.
asi.rollback_reason: New test download_to_file_rejects_oversized_content_length failed under nextest retries, so the experiment is not valid despite unchanged reported coverage.
asi.next_action_hint: If retrying upgrade.rs, inspect failure details for content-length behavior or replace oversized Content-Length with HTTP status/success tests only; otherwise target daemon.rs mock paths for safer coverage.
